languages.text: "Подробный каталог данных "вещиц" был бы весьма богоугоден делу познания, госпожа Хейдари. Мой коллега, как всегда, весьма преждевременен в своих суждениях".
"A detailed catalogue of these 'things' would greatly serve the cause of knowledge, Mistress Heydari. My colleague, as always, is far too hasty in his judgements."
languages.original_text: "Подробный каталог данных "вещиц" был бы весьма богоугоден делу познания, госпожа Хейдари. Мой коллега, как всегда, весьма преждевременен в своих суждениях".

traits.locale_text: "A detailed catalogue of these 'things' would greatly serve the cause of cognition, Mistress Heydari. My colleague, as always, is far too premature in his judgments."
"A detailed catalogue of these 'things' would greatly serve the cause of cognition, Mistress Heydari. My colleague, as always, is far too premature in his judgments."
"A detailed catalogue of these 'things' would greatly serve the cause of knowledge, Mistress Heydari. My colleague, as always, is far too hasty in his judgements."
"A detailed catalogue of these 'things' would greatly serve the cause of knowledge, Mistress Heydari. My colleague, as always, is far too hasty in his judgements."

languages.text: «Un catálogo detallado de estas "cosas" beneficiaría ampliamente a la causa del conocimiento, maestra Heydari. Mi colega, como de costumbre, se precipita al juzgar».
languages.original_text: "A detailed catalogue of these 'things' would greatly serve the cause of knowledge, Mistress Heydari. My colleague, as always, is far too hasty in his judgements."

traits.locale_text: «Un catálogo detallado de estas "cosas" beneficiaría ampliamente a la causa del conocimiento, maestra Heydari. Mi colega, como de costumbre, se precipita al juzgar».

languages.text: “如果能为这些‘东西’建立一份详尽目录，将对知识事业大有裨益，海达利女士。我的同僚，下结论时向来过于草率。”
languages.original_text: "A detailed catalogue of these 'things' would greatly serve the cause of knowledge, Mistress Heydari. My colleague, as always, is far too hasty in his judgements."

traits.locale_text: “如果能为这些‘东西’建立一份详尽目录，将对知识事业大有裨益，海达利女士。我的同僚，下结论时向来过于草率。”

languages.text: "Ein detaillierter Katalog dieser 'Dinge' wäre der Sache des Wissens überaus zuträglich, Meisterin Heydari. Mein Kollege urteilt wie so oft überstürzt."
languages.original_text: "A detailed catalogue of these 'things' would greatly serve the cause of knowledge, Mistress Heydari. My colleague, as always, is far too hasty in his judgements."

traits.locale_text: "Ein detaillierter Katalog dieser 'Dinge' wäre der Sache des Wissens überaus zuträglich, Meisterin Heydari. Mein Kollege urteilt wie so oft überstürzt."

languages.text: « Un inventaire exhaustif desdits "objets" servirait admirablement la cause de la connaissance, maîtresse Heydari. Comme toujours, mon collègue a tendance à se montrer hâtif dans son jugement. »
languages.original_text: "A detailed catalogue of these 'things' would greatly serve the cause of knowledge, Mistress Heydari. My colleague, as always, is far too hasty in his judgements."

traits.locale_text: « Un inventaire exhaustif desdits "objets" servirait admirablement la cause de la connaissance, maîtresse Heydari. Comme toujours, mon collègue a tendance à se montrer hâtif dans son jugement. »

languages.text: "Bu 'şeylerin' ayrıntılı bir kataloğu, irfan davasına büyük hizmet edecektir Üstat Heydari. Meslektaşım her zamanki gibi yargılarında çok aceleci."
languages.original_text: "A detailed catalogue of these 'things' would greatly serve the cause of knowledge, Mistress Heydari. My colleague, as always, is far too hasty in his judgements."

traits.locale_text: "Bu 'şeylerin' ayrıntılı bir kataloğu, irfan davasına büyük hizmet edecektir Üstat Heydari. Meslektaşım her zamanki gibi yargılarında çok aceleci."

languages.text: 「これらの『物』の詳しいカタログは、知識の普及に大いに役立つでしょう、ヘイダリー夫人。私の同僚は、相変わらず判断が早すぎるのです。」
languages.original_text: "A detailed catalogue of these 'things' would greatly serve the cause of knowledge, Mistress Heydari. My colleague, as always, is far too hasty in his judgements."

traits.locale_text: 「これらの『物』の詳しいカタログは、知識の普及に大いに役立つでしょう、ヘイダリー夫人。私の同僚は、相変わらず判断が早すぎるのです。」
